subcodes.first_line: O thou who art attracted by the fragrances of the Abhá Kingdom! May God expand thy breast through grace overflowing from the clouds of His benevolence [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای منجذب بنفحات ملکوت ابهی شرح الله صدرک بفیض طافح من سحائب عنایه البهاء
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @firmness in the Covenant, @generosity [kirama], @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution, @permission for visit; pilgrimage
